title: Better file transfer
description: Chunked, resumable file transfer with progress reporting, replacing the /cat stopgap. Required: sender chunks file into fixed-size blocks, pads each block (reuse envelope padding), sends as ClearMessage::FileChunk sequence; receiver reassembles, verifies hash, writes to disk; progress display on both ends; resumption on disconnect from last confirmed chunk; configurable relay-side size cap (default 10 MB) to prevent amplification; file metadata (name, MIME type) in first chunk header; /send <path> CLI command.
close_reason: Chunked file transfer complete: /send <path> CLI command, FileHeader+FileChunk protocol types, 65536-byte pad bucket, SHA-256 verify, safe_name path-traversal guard, FILE_MAX_CHUNKS=230 OOM guard, duplicate-header protection. Review converged after 2 rounds.
